title: Disable GraphQL introspection in production
description: Enforce disabling GraphQL introspection in production to prevent leaking sensitive information.
message: Introspection should be disabled in production.
recommendation: Configure Apollo Server or your GraphQL server to disable introspection.

noncompliant.code:
from graphql import GraphQLSchema

introspection_type = "schema"

schema = GraphQLSchema(
    type_defs=None,
    resolvers=None,
    introspection_type=introspection_type
)
noncompliant.description: Introspection type is explicitly set to schema.

compliant.code:
from graphql import GraphQLSchema

introspection_type = None

schema = GraphQLSchema(
    type_defs=None,
    resolvers=None,
    introspection_type=introspection_type
)
compliant.description: Introspection type is not set or set to None.

why_is_this_an_issue: Introspection may reveal details about the GraphQL schema and data structure, potentially leaking sensitive information such as field names, types, and relationships.
how_to_fix: Disable introspection by setting the `introspection_type` to `None` or not setting it at all.
